'''tazhoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cddr|cddr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cddr|cddr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tazhoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzheketh|tæzheketh]] || [[word:tæzhekej|tæzhekej]] || [[word:tæzhekesh|tæzhekesh]] || [[word:tæzheke|tæzheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazhozhokoth|tazhozhokoth]] || [[word:tazhozhokoj|tazhozhokoj]] || [[word:tazhozhokosh|tazhozhokosh]] || [[word:tazhozhoko|tazhozhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazhokoth|tazhokoth]] || [[word:tazhokoj|tazhokoj]] || [[word:tazhokosh|tazhokosh]] || [[word:tazhoko|tazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazhofkoth|tazhofkoth]] || [[word:tazhofkoj|tazhofkoj]] || [[word:tazhofkosh|tazhofkosh]] || [[word:tazhofkof|tazhofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazhokotho|tazhokotho]] || [[word:tazhokojo|tazhokojo]] || [[word:tazhokosho|tazhokosho]] || [[word:tazhokoko|tazhokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazhokoth|tazhokoth]] || [[word:tazhokoj|tazhokoj]] || [[word:tazhokosh|tazhokosh]] || [[word:tazhoko|tazhoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazhokothol|tazhokothol]] || [[word:tazhokojol|tazhokojol]] || [[word:tazhokoshol|tazhokoshol]] || [[word:tazhokokol|tazhokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazhokothotho|tazhokothotho]] || [[word:tazhokojojo|tazhokojojo]] || [[word:tazhokoshosho|tazhokoshosho]] || [[word:tazhokoko|tazhokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazhokothon|tazhokothon]] || [[word:tazhokojon|tazhokojon]] || [[word:tazhokoshon|tazhokoshon]] || [[word:tazhokokon|tazhokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazhokothoro|tazhokothoro]] || [[word:tazhokojoro|tazhokojoro]] || [[word:tazhokoshoro|tazhokoshoro]] || [[word:tazhokokoro|tazhokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
